alerts.sub: Single account distributes funds to many recipients
alerts.description: FAN_OUT — Multi-GNN flagged 3 transaction(s) across 4 accounts (mean prob 0.01, peak 0.01).
riskIndicators: Ranked in the top 1% of all scored transactions by the Multi-GNN — the model's highest-confidence laundering tier, learned from confirmed laundering cases in training.

Executed outside standard banking hours (around 03:00–03:59) — a common timing tactic to reduce scrutiny.

It is the CONFLUENCE of 2 independent signals on the same cluster — not any single pattern — that elevates this above normal activity. Whitelisting can't pre-clear this because the combination, not the entities, is what's anomalous.
